steps.title: Substitute the input value
steps.content:
Use the definition of $g$ and replace $x$ with $16$:
$$g(16)=\frac{7}{8}(16)-\frac{5}{8}$$

steps.title: Evaluate the expression
steps.content:
Compute the value using a common denominator:
$$g(16)=14-\frac{5}{8}=\frac{112}{8}-\frac{5}{8}=\frac{107}{8}$$
The answer is C.
